issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error scenarios and edge cases comprehensively.

scenarios.name: Offline-first TaskRepository with Flow
scenarios.rationale: Treatment returns Flow via db.observeAll().map { entities.map { it.toTask() } }, uses multiplatform generateUuid(), and calls db.markPendingSync(task.id) in the catch as the skill shows; baseline uses java.util.UUID (non-multiplatform) and lacks the explicit pending-sync mark.

scenarios.name: Platform-specific UUID and platform name via expect/actual
scenarios.rationale: Both define expect/actual correctly, but treatment includes Build.VERSION.SDK_INT on Android and UIDevice.currentDevice.systemName()/systemVersion on iOS, matching the skill's exact platform identification.
